title: WESTWOOD FOX Leather Gardening Gloves for Men Women,Tough Leather Safety Work Glove,Heavy Duty Rigger Protective Gloves,Thorn Proof Garden Gloves with Strong Grip for Garden,Brambles Yard (YELLOW, M)
features: 🔸 1. HEAVY DUTY LEATHER GLOVES – BUILT TO LAST IN HARSH CONDITIONS Made from thick, full-grain leather, these premium gardening gloves are designed for rugged outdoor and industrial use. Whether you're handling brambles, pulling nettles, or lifting heavy materials, they provide excellent abrasion resistance and long-term durability. Perfect for professional landscapers, construction workers, and home gardeners alike.

🔸 2. THORN-PROOF & BRAMBLE-RESISTANT FOR MAXIMUM HAND PROTECTION Say goodbye to painful pricks and scratches. These Garden gloves are thorn proof and puncture resistant, offering reliable protection when pruning roses, trimming hedges, clearing brambles, or cutting back overgrown shrubs. Ideal for use in dense undergrowth or when handling spiky plants and barbed wire.

🔸 3. ENHANCED GRIP & DEXTERITY FOR SAFER, MORE EFFICIENT WORK Textured leather palms and fingers provide a strong, secure grip even in wet or slippery conditions. The ergonomic shape and reinforced stitching offer full finger movement and control while using tools, making them suitable for tasks like hammering, welding, and precise mechanical repairs.

🔸 4. MULTIPURPOSE WORK GLOVES – FOR GARDENING, CONSTRUCTION & DIY Engineered for versatility, these gloves are suitable for a wide range of jobs. Use them as gardening gloves, rigger gloves, welding gloves, or general-purpose work gloves. Ideal for yard work, fencing, woodworking, farming, and auto repairs—wherever hand safety is critical.

🔸 5. COMFORTABLE, BREATHABLE & DESIGNED TO FIT MEN AND WOMEN Interior lining ensures comfort during long hours of use, while the breathable leather prevents overheating. Adjustable cuffs offer a secure fit for both men and women, helping reduce hand fatigue during prolonged tasks in the garden or on the jobsite.
